title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Law, Luffy as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.
summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 7 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
